findings.evidence: `rg -n "apply_stdComplexLine|isComplexLinearMap.*stdComplexLine|stdComplexLine.*iff" code/TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/JHolomorphicLine.lean` shows only forward lemmas at lines 139 and 155, with no `iff` or converse lemma.
findings.fix: Add a characteristic theorem such as `isComplexLinearMap_stdComplexLine_iff : IsComplexLinearMap (AlmostComplexStructure.product ℝ) J F ↔ F stdComplexLineImag = J (F stdComplexLineReal)` and use it for an intro lemma; derive the current elimination lemmas from it.
findings.issue: The public API has `IsComplexLinearMap.apply_stdComplexLineImag` and `apply_stdComplexLine`, but no converse/iff characterizing `IsComplexLinearMap (AlmostComplexStructure.product ℝ) J F` by `F stdComplexLineImag = J (F stdComplexLineReal)`, so consumers still have to unfold/prove the all-vectors intertwining condition from coordinates.

summary: The standard-line surface gives only elimination formulas from complex-linearity, but not the corresponding introduction/iff lemma needed to use the coordinate Cauchy--Riemann equation as an API.
